1ugidh2.title: AITA for being blunt with my boyfriend about why he isn't getting hired anywhere?

ai_quality.reason: The story has great viral potential and fits the niche, but the opening needs to be rewritten to immediately grab attention on Shorts.
ai_quality.hook_suggestion: Como gerente de Recursos Humanos, le dije a mi novio la dolorosa verdad de por qué nadie lo contrata y ahora me acusa de destruir su autoestima.
